recap: Created is-python autoload function (extension-only, no shebang) with 6 BATS tests covering .py, other extensions, no extension, symlink, directory, and missing path.
Created python-test-path script: returns already-a-test paths as-is, resolves source files to __tests__/test_{basename}.py, exits non-zero for missing tests or no argument; 5 BATS tests.
Extended python-lint to accept multiple file arguments; loops over each applying ruff format+check+report, exits non-zero if any file has remaining violations; single-file still works.
